name: vitest-midscene-addon
description: Enhance Vitest with Midscene for smarter, easier UI testing across Web, Android, and iOS
abstract: Three-phase skill (Create → Transform → Enhance) for AI-driven E2E testing. Detects project state, scaffolds new projects, converts existing ones non-destructively, and creates/updates/debugs/runs tests. Uses Midscene for natural-language UI interaction, Vitest as the test framework, and Playwright/ADB/WDA for platform automation.
author: midscene
scope: Project state detection, scaffolding, non-destructive conversion, E2E test CRUD, debugging, and execution
